approved_decisions_applied: Only horn and derma macro zone types are used.
Accessory digit / unghiello / UG is treated as horn.
Periungual / skin zones are treated as derma.
horn areas use observation_group horn_lesion and popup_kind horn.
derma areas use observation_group derma_lesion and popup_kind skin.
White line ids use WL_AB and WL_AX with legacy ids preserved.
promotion_blockers: This file is not the definitive manifest.
Exact correspondence with final clickable SVG paths still requires review.
Terminology alignment with the official International Claw Map should be reviewed before promotion.

areas.human_approval_reason: Approved macro decisions are applied. Human review remains required only for official terminology alignment and final SVG path correspondence before promotion.
